scalars.name: snmpModules
scalars.description:
Text
                  RevisionPart

    VALUE NOTATION ::=
                  value(VALUE OBJECT IDENTIFIER)

    RevisionPart ::=
                  Revisions
                | empty
    Revisions ::=
                  Revision
                | Revisions Revision
    Revision ::=

scalars.name: superDevice
scalars.description:
Comprehensive test MIB for SNMPSimMgr.
         Covers all field types, access modes, tables,
         enums, constraints, traps, and DIO controls.

scalars.name: sdDescription
scalars.currentValue: Super Device for comprehensive SNMP testing — all types, tables, and controls.

scalars.name: sdUptime
scalars.description: Time since last reboot in hundredths of a second.

scalars.name: sdOperState
scalars.description: Current operational state of the device.

scalars.name: sdAlarmActive
scalars.description: Indicates whether any alarm is currently active.

scalars.name: sdTotalBytesIn
scalars.description: Total bytes received across all interfaces.

scalars.name: sdTotalBytesOut
scalars.description: Total bytes transmitted across all interfaces.

scalars.name: sdTotalPacketsIn
scalars.description: Total packets received across all interfaces.

scalars.name: sdTotalPacketsOut
scalars.description: Total packets transmitted across all interfaces.

scalars.name: sdLastRebootReason
scalars.description: Reason for the last device reboot.

scalars.name: sdSnmpEnabled
scalars.description: Enable or disable the SNMP agent.

scalars.name: sdHttpsEnabled
scalars.description: Enable or disable HTTPS web interface.

scalars.name: sdTelnetEnabled
scalars.description: Enable or disable Telnet access (deprecated, insecure).

scalars.name: sdBannerMotd
scalars.description: Message of the day banner shown at login.
scalars.currentValue: Welcome to SuperDevice Lab. Authorized access only.

scalars.name: sdIfTable
scalars.description: Network interface table with full detail.

scalars.name: sdDioTable
scalars.description:
Digital Input/Output control table.
                 Each DIO channel can be configured as input or output
                 with various modes and trigger options.

columns.name: sdIfInOctets
columns.description: Total bytes received on this interface.

columns.name: sdIfOutOctets
columns.description: Total bytes transmitted on this interface.

columns.name: sdSensorValue
columns.description: Current sensor reading (units depend on sensor type).

columns.name: sdSensorUnits
columns.description: Display units for this sensor (C, %, V, RPM, W, A).

columns.name: sdSensorThresholdLow
columns.description: Lower threshold. Alarm triggers if value goes below.

columns.name: sdSensorThresholdHigh
columns.description: Upper threshold. Alarm triggers if value goes above.

columns.name: sdUserEnabled
columns.description: Whether this user account is active.

columns.name: sdUserLastLoginIp
columns.description: IP address of the last successful login.

columns.name: sdUserRowStatus
columns.description: Row status for creating/deleting user entries.

columns.name: sdVlanMemberPorts
columns.description: Comma-separated list of untagged member port indices.

columns.name: sdVlanTaggedPorts
columns.description: Comma-separated list of tagged (trunk) port indices.

columns.name: sdDioAlarmEnabled
columns.description: Whether trigger events generate an SNMP trap.

columns.name: sdDioState
columns.description: Current logical state (read for input, write for output).

columns.name: sdDioInverted
columns.description: Whether the logical state is inverted.
